assumptions: The question concerns hedge accounting in consolidated financial statements under IFRS 9.
The intragroup dividend gives rise to foreign currency exposure relevant at consolidation level.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: A recognized intragroup receivable raises the recognized-item hedge family, which maps to the fair value hedge model.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: An intragroup dividend exposure can also be analysed within the forecast-transaction hedge family, which maps to the cash flow hedge model.

approaches.label: Net investment hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS guidance in the provided context separately identifies the net investment hedge model for foreign currency exposures in consolidated financial statements.
